title: IBM and Red Hat launch Lightwell to defend open-source code from AI attacks | ZDNET
description: Their plan to protect open-source projects from AI-discovered security holes has led to the launch of two commercial offerings: Lightwell Network and Lightwell Clearinghouse Premie

title: A Script for Mark Zuckerberg – Stratechery by Ben Thompson
Who does Anubis actually stop? | Farid Zakaria’s Blog
description: I have been working on a patch to the Linux kernel to support $ORIGIN for the interpreter (PT_INTERP) via bpf in binfmt_misc [thread].

title: Who does Anubis actually stop? | Farid Zakaria’s Blog
description: I have been working on a patch to the Linux kernel to support $ORIGIN for the interpreter (PT_INTERP) via bpf in binfmt_misc [thread].

title: 'I'm not a programmer' anymore: Linus Torvalds on the only two tools he uses now | ZDNET
description: At the Open Source Summit in Mumbai, Torvalds discusses the pain and power of AI in the kernel, and why Linux no longer supports 'museum' technology.

title: Even Linus Torvalds is vibe coding now | ZDNET
description: It was on a very silly project, but with even Linux's creator now using AI, the debate over code quality, maintainability, and developer skills is likely to intensify.
